prompt: Generate a solution for the cloud-migration--grosse-energieversorger-de proposition. The project is at the path provided. This is a project-type solution (cloud-services product has revenue_model: project). After generating, run the stakeholder review assessor to evaluate the solution from three perspectives (procurement reviewer, provider SA, client SA). If the verdict is 'revise', apply the improvements and re-assess.

assertions.text: All four pricing tiers present (proof_of_value, small, medium, large)
Review assessment JSON produced with all three perspectives
If verdict was revise, a second assessment exists with improved scores
Phase descriptions are in German (portfolio language: de)
